{"id":"project-LICHEN-2h1i.1","title":"task","description":"## Recommendation: T-Echo

| Board | MCU | GPS | Price (bulk) | 500 units |
|-------|-----|-----|--------------|-----------|
| Heltec V3 | ESP32-S3 | No | ~$12-15 | $6,000-7,500 |
| Heltec V3 + external GPS | ESP32-S3 | Wired | ~$18-20 | $9,000-10,000 |
| RAK4631 + RAK12500 | nRF52840 | Snap-in | ~$32 | $16,000 |
| **T-Echo** | nRF52840 | Built-in | ~$48 | **$24,000** |

## Why T-Echo
- GPS built-in (required for TDMA sync, GPSR routing, location apps)
- E-ink shows status (survives battery, visible in sun)
- nRF52840 (clean BLE, Zephyr native, UF2 flash)
- Already has LICHEN board support
- No assembly required

## Action Items
1. Contact LilyGO business inquiry for 500-unit quote
2. Confirm battery + case included
3. Get lead time estimate
4.
